concerns.text: User Story 0 (FR-006, SC-001) requires 'facilitating the recruitment of a small cohort (n=20)'. Task T011 only implements a local Flask interface to 'present images'. There is no task defined for the recruitment mechanism (e.g., Prolific integration, participant management, or external data ingestion pipeline) required to actually obtain the 20 human ratings. The system cannot satisfy the FR without a way to get the participants.

FR-001 and NFR-001 require processing 1080p images within 30s. Task T019 explicitly changes the strategy to 'resize to 640x640' to meet performance. While the Plan.md acknowledges this, the Spec.md NFR-001 strictly mandates 1080p input. There is no task to update the Spec.md NFR-001 or document the resolution change as a formal requirement amendment, creating a gap where the spec requirement is technically unmet by the current task set.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) mandates that results be reproducible by re-running code against data on a fresh runner. Task T048 ('Run quickstart.md validation') is described as a manual documentation check. There is no task to implement an automated, scriptable end-to-end reproducibility test (e.g., a CI job or script that spins up a fresh env, runs the pipeline, and verifies checksums) as required by the Constitution.

FR-005b and SC-005 explicitly require calculating and reporting the 'standard deviation of the effect sizes' as the definition of stability. Task T041 implements the sensitivity sweep but lacks a specific sub-task or verification step to explicitly calculate and report this specific metric, risking a partial implementation where the sweep occurs but the required stability metric is omitted.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires external citations to be verified against primary sources. Task T032 mentions fetching clips from 'a public repository (e.g., ucimlrepo or a specific GitHub raw URL)' but does not include a task to identify, verify, and record the specific URL/dataset ID in the plan or data-model. Without a task to lock down the specific verified source, the 'Single Source of Truth' requirement for the stimuli is not fully covered.
